V1 INDEPENDENT finding: cf_value() at pcf-research/pcf2/session_C1_2026-05-01/session_c1_wkb.py L78-86 implements the canonical (1, b) continued fraction recurrence verbatim — line 84 reads 'x = bk + mp.mpf(1) / x' with no a_k multiplicative factor on the 1/x term. The variable names a3, a2, a1, a0 (line 80) unpack the polynomial coefficients of b_n (cubic in k), not an a_n sequence. The numerator a_n is hardcoded to identically 1 via mp.mpf(1) on line 84. Therefore deg_a = 0 in the implementation. Determined by direct file inspection (read-only) BEFORE consulting synth_substitute_verdict.md body.

V3 INDEPENDENT finding: PCF-2 v1.3 program statement at tex/submitted/pcf2_program_statement.tex L228-234 declares verbatim 'a_n = delta_1 n + delta_0, delta_1, delta_0 in Z' (eq:an, L230) and 'b_n = alpha_3 n^3 + alpha_2 n^2 + alpha_1 n + alpha_0, alpha_i in Z, alpha_3 ne 0' (eq:bn, L232) with Wallis recurrence p_n = b_n p_{n-1} + a_n p_{n-2} (L235) and seeds (p_{-1}, p_0, q_{-1}, q_0) = (1, b_0, 0, 1). NO restriction delta_1 ne 0 is imposed. Therefore the declared scope is deg_a in {0, 1} formally with deg_a = 0 (a_n equiv 1, delta_1 = 0, delta_0 = 1) as a corner of the declared scope. Determined by direct file inspection (read-only) BEFORE consulting synth_substitute_verdict.md body. Contrasts with PCF-1 v1.3 d=2 stratum (V4) which imposes delta ne 0 strictly.

V6 INDEPENDENT WZ Newton-polygon balance derivation for the Wallis-class CF p_n = b_n p_{n-1} + a_n p_{n-2} with deg_a = 0 (a_n equiv 1) and deg_b = d (b_n ~ c_b n^d): characteristic equation a_n r^2 + b_n r - 1 = 0 with roots r_- ~ 1/(c_b n^d) (small, dominant solution) and r_+ ~ -c_b n^d (large, recessive solution); Balance (I) leading mu_dom = d, gamma_dom = c_b e^{-d}; Balance (III) sub-leading mu_sub = -d, gamma_sub proportional to -c_a/c_b at leading order (sign from r_+ < 0 for positive a_n, b_n); A_naive = mu_dom - mu_sub = d - (-d) = 2d for deg_a = 0; general formula A_naive = 2d - d_a yielding A=3 at deg_a=1 d=2 (PCF-1 QL01-QL26), A=4 at deg_a=0 d=2 (V_quad), A=6 at deg_a=0 d=3 (PCF-2 cubic harvest), A=8 at deg_a=0 d=4 (PCF-2 Q1 quartic harvest). Derivation conducted from first principles BEFORE consulting synth_substitute_verdict.md body.
